narrative:
Orange Twp township has 25,374 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a clear Republican lean of 7.8 percentage points.
